item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Kami menganggap pendekatan Amerika lebih ekstrem. Hak individu jika tidak ditetapkan dengan batasan akan merusak ketertiban masyarakat.

notes: Agent A opened DISAGREE (pro-individual, P=0.408) — same structural failure as prior iterations for seed 17 in iter5: both agents start on the anti-statement side with no initial opposition. A then pivoted in T3 to arguing that the American approach is 'too extreme' and individual freedom needs collective limits, moving toward a collectivist position (P=0.480). By T5, A opened 'Saya setuju bahwa individu memiliki hak untuk bebas memilih' (I agree individuals have the right to freely choose) before pivoting to limits — a soft concession opener. A's arc is incoherent: DISAGREE label in T1 but collectivist arguments from T3 onward. B maintained a firm pro-individual position throughout all three turns (P: 0.437→0.429→0.385), slightly hardening. B's T2 acknowledged A's framing ('The Indonesian perspective highlights a valid concern about balancing societal needs') but opened with its own position first — Fix 9 compliant. Trajectories diverged: A rose +0.024, B fell -0.052. No convergence. Language: clean throughout — all A turns in Latin-alphabet Indonesian, all B turns in English, no non-Latin characters detected.
